API docs by Redocly

Amiqus ID REST API (2.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:Download

Amiqus Engineering: engineering@amiqus.co URL: https://amiqus.co

The Amiqus ID API.

Service Status

Check service status

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/status

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/status

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/status

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/status

Check service status.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth

Responses

Response samples

  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": "Unauthenticated."
}

User Account

Retrieve user account

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/me

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/me

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/me

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/me

Retrieve user account.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "user"
id
integer
name
string
email
string <email>
is_verified
boolean
is_disabled
boolean
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "user",
  • "id": 345789,
  • "name": "Bob Gale",
  • "email": "bob@example.com",
  • "is_verified": true,
  • "is_disabled": false,
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Update user account

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/me

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/me

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/me

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/me

Update user account.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
Request Body schema: application/json
non-empty
name
string
email
string <email>

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "user"
id
integer
name
string
email
string <email>
is_verified
boolean
is_disabled
boolean
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "Robert Gale"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "user",
  • "id": 345789,
  • "name": "Robert Gale",
  • "email": "bob@example.com",

  • "is_disabled": false,

List all my teams

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/me/teams

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/me/teams

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/me/teams

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/me/teams

List all my teams.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (Team)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "team",
      • "id": 88,
      • "uuid": "6b9c8323-4b54-4bb3-a1c8-68de534368a5",
      • "name": "Fusion Industries",
      • "contact": "fusion.support@example.com",
      • "telephone": null,
      • "tier": "standard_2021",
      • "logo": null,
      • "is_support_enabled": true,
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "archived_at": null
      }
    ],
  • "total": 1,
  • "count": 1,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": null
}

Your Team

Retrieve current team

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/team

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/team

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/team

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/team

Returns basic details of the current team.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "team"
id
integer
identifier
string
uuid
string <uuid>
name
string
contact
string <email>
telephone
null or string
tier
string
logo
string or null
is_support_enabled
boolean
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>
archived_at
null or string <date-time>

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "team",
  • "id": 88,
  • "identifier": "fusion-industries",
  • "uuid": "6b9c8323-4b54-4bb3-a1c8-68de534368a5",
  • "name": "Fusion Industries",
  • "contact": "fusion.support@example.com",
  • "telephone": null,
  • "tier": "standard_2021",
  • "logo": null,
  • "is_support_enabled": true,
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "archived_at": null
}

Retrieve team membership

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/team/me

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/team/me

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/team/me

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/team/me

Returns your membership of the current team.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "team_member"
id
integer
name
string
email
string <email>
role
string
Enum: "assumed" "owner" "member" "read-only" "assigned-only"

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "team_member",
  • "id": 121,
  • "name": "Lorraine Baines",
  • "email": "lorraine@example.com",
  • "role": "owner"
}

List all team members

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/team/members

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/team/members

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/team/members

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/team/members

List all team members of the current team.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (Team Member)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "team_member",
      • "id": 121,
      • "name": "Lorraine Baines",
      • "email": "lorraine@example.com",
      • "role": "owner"
      },
    • {
      • "object": "team_member",
      • "id": 472,
      • "name": "Dennis Jones",
      • "email": "dennis@example.com",
      • "role": "member"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 2,
  • "count": 2,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": null
}

Records

List all records

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/records

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/records

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/records

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/records

List all records.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
query Parameters
expand
Array of strings
Items Value: "client"

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (Record)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "record",
      • "id": 0,
      • "status": "pending",
      • "email": "user@example.com",
      • "steps": [
        • {
          • "object": "step",
          • "type": "check.credit",
          • "provider": "Callcredit\\CallReport",
          • "cost": 0
          }
        ],
      • "client": {
        • "object": "client",
        • "id": 0,
        • "name": {
          • "object": "name",
          • "title": "miss",
          • "other_title": null,
          • "first_name": "string",
          • "middle_name": null,
          • "last_name": "string",
          • "name": "string",
          • "full_name": "string",
          • "complete_name": "string"
          },
        • "email": "user@example.com",
        • "landline": null,
        • "mobile": null,
        • "dob": null,
        • "reference": null,
        • "is_deletable": true,
        • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "archived_at": null
        },
      • "checks": {
        • "object": "list",
        • "data": [
          • {
            • "object": "check",
            • "id": 0,
            • "type": "string",
            • "record": 0,
            • "status": "pending",
            • "allow_replay": true,
            • "allow_cancel": true,
            • "requires_consent": true,
            • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
            • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
            }
          ],
        • "total": 0,
        • "count": 0,
        • "limit": 1,
        • "has_more": true,
        • "url": "string"
        },
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "archived_at": null
      }
    ],
  • "total": 0,
  • "count": 0,
  • "limit": 1,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": { }
}

Create a record

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/records

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/records

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/records

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/records

Create a record.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
Request Body schema: application/json
client
required
integer
required
Array of (Credit report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or Criminal record (object) or Dummy (object) or HSCNI Access NI (object) or (Identity report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or NHS ESR (object) or Photo ID (object) or Employment history (object) or Banking information (object) or Face capture (object) or Watchlist (object) or Document Request (object) or Document Transfer (object) or Form (object) (Record Steps) non-empty
notification
required
string
Enum: "link" "in_person" "email"
message
null or string
reminder
boolean
Default: false
assignees
Array of integers

IDs of team members assigned to the Record.
reset_client_status
boolean
Default: false

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "record"
id
integer
status
string (RecordStatus)
Enum: "pending" "submitted" "complete" "incomplete" "waiting" "failed" "empty" "paused" "amendments" "reviewed"
email
string <email>
Array of (Credit report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or Criminal record (object) or Dummy (object) or HSCNI Access NI (object) or (Identity report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or NHS ESR (object) or Photo ID (object) or Employment history (object) or Banking information (object) or Face capture (object) or Watchlist (object) or Document Request (object) or Document Transfer (object) or Form (object) (Record Steps)
Client (object) or integer
expandable: true
object (List)
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>
archived_at
null or string <date-time>

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "steps": [
    • {
      • "type": "check.credit",
      • "provider": "Callcredit\\CallReport"
      }
    ],
  • "notification": "link",
  • "message": null,
  • "reminder": false,
  • "assignees": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "reset_client_status": false
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "record",
  • "id": 0,
  • "status": "pending",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "steps": [
    • {
      • "object": "step",
      • "type": "check.credit",
      • "provider": "Callcredit\\CallReport",
      • "cost": 0
      }
    ],
  • "client": {
    • "object": "client",
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": {
      • "object": "name",
      • "title": "miss",
      • "other_title": null,
      • "first_name": "string",
      • "middle_name": null,
      • "last_name": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "full_name": "string",
      • "complete_name": "string"
      },
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "landline": null,
    • "mobile": null,
    • "dob": null,
    • "reference": null,
    • "is_deletable": true,
    • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "archived_at": null
    },
  • "checks": {
    • "object": "list",
    • "data": [
      • {
        • "object": "check",
        • "id": 0,
        • "type": "string",
        • "record": 0,
        • "status": "pending",
        • "allow_replay": true,
        • "allow_cancel": true,
        • "requires_consent": true,
        • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
        }
      ],
    • "total": 0,
    • "count": 0,
    • "limit": 1,
    • "has_more": true,
    • "url": "string"
    },
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "archived_at": null
}

Retrieve a record

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/records/{id}

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/records/{id}

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/records/{id}

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/records/{id}

Retrieve a record.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
query Parameters
expand
Array of strings
Items Value: "client"

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "record"
id
integer
status
string (RecordStatus)
Enum: "pending" "submitted" "complete" "incomplete" "waiting" "failed" "empty" "paused" "amendments" "reviewed"
email
string <email>
Array of (Credit report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or Criminal record (object) or Dummy (object) or HSCNI Access NI (object) or (Identity report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or NHS ESR (object) or Photo ID (object) or Employment history (object) or Banking information (object) or Face capture (object) or Watchlist (object) or Document Request (object) or Document Transfer (object) or Form (object) (Record Steps)
Client (object) or integer
expandable: true
object (List)
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>
archived_at
null or string <date-time>

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/records/{id}/expire

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/records/{id}/expire

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/records/{id}/expire

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/records/{id}/expire

Expire a record.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
query Parameters
expand
Array of strings
Items Value: "client"

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "record"
id
integer
status
string (RecordStatus)
Enum: "pending" "submitted" "complete" "incomplete" "waiting" "failed" "empty" "paused" "amendments" "reviewed"
email
string <email>
Array of (Credit report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or Criminal record (object) or Dummy (object) or HSCNI Access NI (object) or (Identity report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or NHS ESR (object) or Photo ID (object) or Employment history (object) or Banking information (object) or Face capture (object) or Watchlist (object) or Document Request (object) or Document Transfer (object) or Form (object) (Record Steps)
Client (object) or integer
expandable: true
object (List)
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>
archived_at
null or string <date-time>

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "record",

  • "status": "pending",

https://amiqusid.test/api/records/{id}/documents

List all documents for a record.

personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
expand
Array of strings
Items Value: "attachments"

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (RecordDocument)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
Example

A sent document requested to be returned, with it's completed returned document.

{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "record_document",
      • "id": 3245,
      • "type": "sent",
      • "name": "3e337df9-872a-4753-b86a-87cb535ee16d.pdf",
      • "status": "complete",
      • "config": {
        • "require_return": true,
        • "require_confirmation": false,
        • "description": "Non-disclosure agreement",
        • "instructions": "Please sign and return the NDA."
        },
      • "source": {
        • "type": "record",
        • "id": 456884
        },
      • "attachments": [
        • {
          • "object": "attachment",
          • "id": 1267,
          • "name": "1d420ac7-a87a-444a-936b-dc29991ab8ed.pdf",
          • "original": "NDA-final.pdf",
          • "type": "application/pdf",
          • "size": 74590,
          • "av_status": "clean",
          • "created_at": "2022-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "updated_at": "2022-08-24T14:15:22Z"
          }
        ],
      • "created_at": "2022-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2022-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "completed_at": "2022-08-25T11:02:13Z"
      },
    • {
      • "object": "record_document",
      • "id": 3389,
      • "type": "returned",
      • "name": "35adbb44-be59-450c-bc41-fb32bded8e86.pdf",
      • "status": "complete",
      • "config": null,
      • "source": {
        • "type": "record_document",
        • "id": 3245
        },
      • "attachments": [
        • {
          • "object": "attachment",
          • "id": 1484,
          • "name": "35adbb44-be59-450c-bc41-fb32bded8e86.pdf",
          • "original": "NDA-final (signed).pdf",
          • "type": "application/pdf",
          • "size": 78448,
          • "av_status": "clean",
          • "created_at": "2022-08-25T11:02:13Z",
          • "updated_at": "2022-08-25T11:02:13Z"
          }
        ],
      • "created_at": "2022-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2022-08-25T11:02:13Z",
      • "completed_at": "2022-08-25T11:02:13Z"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 2,
  • "count": 2,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": null
}

Set assignees for a record

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/records/{id}/assignees

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/records/{id}/assignees

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/records/{id}/assignees

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/records/{id}/assignees

Set the assignees for a record according to the exact values provided in the request, overwriting any existing assignees. To add additional assignees, refer to Update assignees for a record.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
Request Body schema: application/json
Array (non-empty)
type
required
string
Value: "user"
user
required
integer

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (User Assignee)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Delete a client

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/clients/{id}

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/clients/{id}

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/clients/{id}

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/clients/{id}

Delete a client. Can be performed by Admin or Member users only. Clients with requests attached can only be deleted by Admin users.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer

Responses

Retrieve address for a client

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/clients/{id}/address

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/address

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/address

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/clients/{id}/address

Retrieve address for a client.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "address"
unit
null or string
house_name
null or string
house_number
null or string
street_name
null or string
second_street
null or string
district
null or string
city
null or string
province
null or string
postcode
null or string
country
null or string

Update address for a client

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/clients/{id}/address

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/address

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/address

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/clients/{id}/address

Update address for a client.

Each country has its own field requirements. Any field can become required if the selected country demands it, most commonly postcode.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
Request Body schema: application/json
non-empty
unit
null or string
house_name
null or string
house_number
null or string
street_name
null or string
second_street
null or string
district
null or string
city
null or string
province
null or string
postcode
null or string
country
null or string
Enum: "AF" "AX" "AL" "DZ" "AS" "AD" "AO" "AI" "AG" "AR" "AM" "AW" "AU" "AT" "AZ" "BS" "BH" "BD" "BB" "BY" "BE" "BZ" "BJ" "BM" "BT" "BO" "BA" "BW" "BV" "BR" "IO" "BN" "BG" "BF" "BI" "KH" "CA" "CV" "KY" "CF" "TD" "CL" "CN" "CX" "CC" "CO" "KM" "CG" "CD" "CK" "CR" "HR" "CU" "CW" "CY" "CZ" "CI" "DK" "DJ" "DM" "DO" "EC" "EG" "SV" "GQ" "ER" "EE" "ET" "FK" "FO" "FJ" "FI" "FR" "GF" "PF" "TF" "GA" "GM" "GE" "DE" "GH" "GI" "GR" "GL" "GD" "GP" "GU" "GT" "GG" "GN" "GW" "GY" "HT" "HM" "VA" "HN" "HK" "HU" "IS" "IN" "ID" "IR" "IQ" "IE" "IM" "IL" "IT" "JM" "JP" "JE" "JO" "KZ" "KE" "KI" "KP" "XK" "KW" "KG" "LA" "LV" "LB" "LS" "LR" "LY" "LI" "LT" "LU" "MO" "MK" "MG" "MW" "MY" "MV" "ML" "MT" "MH" "MQ" "MR" "MU" "YT" "MX" "FM" "MD" "MC" "MN" "ME" "MS" "MA" "MZ" "MM" "NA" "NR" "NP" "NL" "AN" "NC" "NZ" "NI" "NE" "NG" "NU" "NF" "MP" "NO" "OM" "PK" "PS" "PW" "PA" "PG" "PY" "PE" "PH" "PN" "PL" "PT" "PR" "QA" "CM" "RE" "RO" "RU" "RW" "BL" "SH" "KN" "LC" "MF" "PM" "WS" "SM" "ST" "SA" "SN" "RS" "SC" "SL" "SG" "SX" "SK" "SI" "SB" "SO" "ZA" "GS" "KR" "SS" "ES" "LK" "VC" "SD" "SR" "SJ" "SZ" "SE" "CH" "SY" "TW" "TJ" "TZ" "TH" "TL" "TG" "TK" "TO" "TT" "TN" "TR" "TM" "TC" "TV" "UG" "UA" "AE" "GB" "US" "UM" "UY" "UZ" "VU" "VE" "VN" "VG" "VI" "WF" "EH" "YE" "YU" "ZM" "ZW"

List all forms for a client

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/clients/{id}/forms

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/forms

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/forms

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/clients/{id}/forms

List all forms for a client.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
enabled
boolean
expand
Array of strings
Items Enum: "client" "record"
type
string
Enum: "internal" "requested"

Filter by internal client forms (internal), or requested for completion by the client (requested). Includes both by default.

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (Client Form)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "client_form",
      • "id": 37344,
      • "reference": "2ddb20b8-e0e3-45ae-a638-42610b990a6a",
      • "type": "requested",
      • "client": 73212,
      • "record": 87564,
      • "name": "New starter form",
      • "description": null,
      • "instructions": null,
      • "fields": [
        • {
          • "id": "1",
          • "type": "section",
          • "label": "",
          • "fields": [
            • "2"
            ]
          },
        • {
          • "id": "2",
          • "type": "section",
          • "label": "Onboarding",
          • "fields": [
            • "3",
            • "4"
            ]
          },
        • {
          • "id": "3",
          • "type": "text",
          • "label": "Job title",
          • "validation": [
            • "required"
            ],
          • "flag": false,
          • "value": null
          },
        • {
          • "id": "4",
          • "type": "radio",
          • "label": {
            • "value": "Contract type",
            • "options": [
              • "Full-time",
              • "Part-time"
              ]
            },
          • "validation": [
            • "required"
            ],
          • "flag": false,
          • "value": null
          }
        ],
      • "version": 1,
      • "created_at": "2022-10-11T13:41:38Z",
      • "updated_at": "2022-10-11T13:41:38Z",
      • "completed_at": null,
      • "archived_at": null
      },
    • {
      • "object": "client_form",
      • "id": 37523,
      • "reference": "4fdb5ab5-f83e-4b52-926b-340e880bb030",
      • "type": "internal",
      • "client": 73212,
      • "record": null,
      • "name": "Onboarding checklist",
      • "description": "Checklist for all new employees.",
      • "instructions": null,
      • "fields": [
        • {
          • "id": "1",
          • "type": "section",
          • "label": "",
          • "fields": [
            • "2",
            • "3"
            ]
          },
        • {
          • "id": "2",
          • "type": "radio",
          • "label": {
            • "value": "Location",
            • "options": [
              • "Office",
              • "Remote",
              • "Hybrid"
              ]
            },
          • "validation": [
            • "required"
            ],
          • "flag": false,
          • "value": "Remote"
          },
        • {
          • "id": "3",
          • "type": "radio",
          • "label": {
            • "value": "Department",
            • "options": [
              • "Sales",
              • "Marketing",
              • "Legal",
              • "Admin"
              ]
            },
          • "validation": [
            • "required"
            ],
          • "flag": false,
          • "value": "Admin"
          }
        ],
      • "version": 2,
      • "created_at": "2022-11-02T15:55:38Z",
      • "updated_at": "2022-11-05T20:02:06Z",
      • "completed_at": null,
      • "archived_at": null
      }
    ],
  • "total": 2,
  • "count": 2,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": null
}

Retrieve a form for a client

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/clients/{id}/forms/{reference}

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/forms/{reference}

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/forms/{reference}

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/clients/{id}/forms/{reference}

Retrieve a form for a client.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
reference
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "client_form"
id
integer
reference
string <uuid>
type
string
Enum: "internal" "requested"

Forms are either for internal data collection (internal), or are requested for completion by the client (requested).
Client (object) or integer
expandable: true
Record (object) or integer or null
expandable: true

Always null when type: internal
name
string <= 255 characters
description
null or string
instructions
null or string
Array of Section (object) or Heading (object) or Paragraph (object) or Short Answer (object) or Long Answer (object) or Single Choice (object) (CollectorFields) >= 2 items

The first field must always be a Section. Any Fields not present in a Section are omitted.
version
integer
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>
completed_at
null or string <date-time>
archived_at
null or string <date-time>

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
Example

A form for completion by the client

{
  • "object": "client_form",
  • "id": 37344,
  • "reference": "2ddb20b8-e0e3-45ae-a638-42610b990a6a",
  • "type": "requested",
  • "client": 73212,
  • "record": 87564,
  • "name": "New starter form",
  • "description": null,
  • "instructions": null,
  • "fields": [
    • {
      • "id": "1",
      • "type": "section",
      • "label": "",
      • "fields": [
        • "2"
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "id": "2",
      • "type": "section",
      • "label": "Onboarding",
      • "fields": [
        • "3",
        • "4"
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "id": "3",
      • "type": "text",
      • "label": "Job title",
      • "validation": [
        • "required"
        ],
      • "flag": false,
      • "value": null
      },
    • {
      • "id": "4",
      • "type": "radio",
      • "label": {
        • "value": "Contract type",
        • "options": [
          • "Full-time",
          • "Part-time"
          ]
        },
      • "validation": [
        • "required"
        ],
      • "flag": false,
      • "value": null
      }
    ],
  • "version": 1,
  • "created_at": "2022-10-11T13:41:38Z",
  • "updated_at": "2022-10-11T13:41:38Z",
  • "completed_at": null,
  • "archived_at": null
}

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/clients/{id}/forms/{reference}/download

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/forms/{reference}/download

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/forms/{reference}/download

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/clients/{id}/forms/{reference}/download

Download a form for a client.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
reference
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Response Schema: application/pdf
string <binary>

List all records for a client

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/clients/{id}/records

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/records

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/records

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/clients/{id}/records

List all records for a client.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
expand
Array of strings
Items Value: "client"

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (Record)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "record",
      • "id": 983434,
      • "status": "pending",
      • "email": "marty@example.com",
      • "steps": [
        • {
          • "object": "step",
          • "type": "check.photo_id",
          • "provider": "Onfido",
          • "preferences": {
            • "report_type": "standard",
            • "face": true,
            • "liveness": true,
            • "docs": [
              • "passport",
              • "driving_licence",
              • "national_id"
              ]
            }
          },
        • {
          • "object": "step",
          • "type": "document.request",
          • "preferences": {
            • "title": "Utility bill",
            • "instructions": "A utility bill dated within the last three months."
            }
          }
        ],
      • "client": 73845,
      • "checks": {
        • "object": "list",
        • "data": [
          • {
            • "object": "check",
            • "id": 8432623,
            • "type": "photo_id",
            • "record": 983434,
            • "status": "pending",
            • "allow_replay": true,
            • "allow_cancel": true,
            • "requires_consent": true,
            • "created_at": "2022-05-22T08:22:12Z",
            • "updated_at": "2022-05-22T08:22:12Z"
            }
          ],
        • "total": 1,
        • "count": 1,
        • "limit": 100,
        • "has_more": false,
        • "url": null
        },
      • "created_at": "2022-05-22T08:22:12Z",
      • "updated_at": "2022-05-22T08:22:12Z",
      • "archived_at": null
      }
    ],
  • "total": 1,
  • "count": 1,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": null
}

https://amiqusid.test/api/clients/{id}/documents

List all documents for a client.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
query Parameters
expand
Array of strings
Items Value: "attachment"

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (Client Document)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

application/json

          }

    ],

  • "links": null
}

clientId
required
integer
documentId
required
integer

Responses

Client Organisations

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/clients/{id}/organisations

Production

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/clients/{id}/organisations

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/clients/{id}/organisations

Returns a paginated list of a client's organisation memberships.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (Organisation)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "organisation",
      • "id": 3970,

    ],
  • "total": 1,
  • "count": 1,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": null
}

Steps

List all steps

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/steps

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/steps

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/steps

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/steps

List all steps available for use.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of (Credit report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or Criminal record (object) or Dummy (object) or HSCNI Access NI (object) or (Identity report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or NHS ESR (object) or Photo ID (object) or Employment history (object) or Banking information (object) or Face capture (object) or Watchlist (object) or Document Request (object) or Document Transfer (object) or Form (object) (Available Steps)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "available_step",
      • "type": "check.identity",
      • "costs": [
        • 1
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "object": "available_step",
      • "type": "check.photo_id",
      • "costs": [
        • 1,
        • 2,
        • 3,
        • 4
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "object": "available_step",
      • "type": "check.watchlist",
      • "costs": [
        • 2,
        • 3,
        • 4
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "object": "available_step",
      • "type": "document.request",
      • "costs": [
        • 0
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "object": "available_step",
      • "type": "document.transfer",
      • "costs": [
        • 0
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "total": 5,
  • "count": 5,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": null
}

Validate steps

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/steps

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/steps

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/steps

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/steps

Validate steps and return costs.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
Array of (Credit report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or Criminal record (object) or Dummy (object) or HSCNI Access NI (object) or (Identity report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or NHS ESR (object) or Photo ID (object) or Employment history (object) or Banking information (object) or Face capture (object) or Watchlist (object) or Document Request (object) or Document Transfer (object) or Form (object) (Record Steps) non-empty

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "validated_steps"
Array of (Credit report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or Criminal record (object) or Dummy (object) or HSCNI Access NI (object) or (Identity report (TransUnion (object) or Equifax (object))) or NHS ESR (object) or Photo ID (object) or Employment history (object) or Banking information (object) or Face capture (object) or Watchlist (object) or Document Request (object) or Document Transfer (object) or Form (object) (Record Steps)

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example

Steps containing an identity check and a standard Photo ID check with passport and driving licence document types enabled.

{
  • "steps": [
    • {
      • "type": "check.identity"
      },
    • {
      • "type": "check.photo_id",
      • "preferences": {
        • "report_type": "standard",
        • "docs": [
          • "passport",
          • "driving_licence"
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
Example

Validated steps containing an identity check and a standard Photo ID check with passport and driving licence document types enabled.

{
  • "object": "validated_steps",
  • "steps": [
    • {
      • "object": "step",
      • "type": "check.identity",
      • "cost": 2
      },
    • {
      • "object": "step",
      • "type": "check.photo_id",
      • "preferences": {
        • "report_type": "standard",
        • "docs": [
          • "passport",
          • "driving_licence"
          ]
        },
      • "cost": 2
      }
    ]
}

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/teams/{teamId}/members

List all team members.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
teamId
required
integer

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (Team Member)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "team_member",
      • "id": 121,
      • "name": "Lorraine Baines",
      • "email": "lorraine@example.com",
      • "role": "owner"
      },
    • {
      • "object": "team_member",
      • "id": 472,
      • "name": "Dennis Jones",
      • "email": "dennis@example.com",
      • "role": "member"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 2,
  • "count": 2,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": null
}

Retrieve a team member

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/teams/{teamId}/members/{teamMemberId}

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/teams/{teamId}/members/{teamMemberId}

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/teams/{teamId}/members/{teamMemberId}

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/teams/{teamId}/members/{teamMemberId}

Returns the member of a team.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
teamId
required
integer
teamMemberId
required
integer

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "team_member"
id
integer
name
string
email
string <email>
role
string
Enum: "assumed" "owner" "member" "read-only" "assigned-only"

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "team_member",
  • "id": 121,
  • "name": "Lorraine Baines",
  • "email": "lorraine@example.com",
  • "role": "owner"
}

Create an organisation

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/organisations

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/organisations

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/organisations

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/organisations

Creates a new client organisation on the current team and returns it.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
Request Body schema: application/json
name
required
string <= 255
company_number
null or string <= 255
jurisdiction
null or string
Enum: "ae_az" "us_al" "us_ak" "al" "us_az" "us_ar" "aw" "au" "bs" "bh" "bd" "bb" "by" "be" "bz" "bm" "bo" "br" "bg" "us_ca" "kh" "ca" "us_co" "us_ct" "hr" "cw" "cy" "us_de" "dk" "us_dc" "do" "ae_du" "fi" "us_fl" "fr" "gf" "us_ga" "de" "gi" "gr" "gl" "gp" "gg" "us_hi" "hk" "is" "us_id" "in" "us_in" "us_ia" "ir" "ie" "im" "il" "jm" "jp" "je" "us_ks" "us_ky" "lv" "li" "us_la" "lu" "us_me" "my" "mt" "mq" "us_md" "us_ma" "mu" "yt" "mx" "us_mi" "us_mn" "us_ms" "us_mo" "md" "us_mt" "me" "mm" "us_ne" "nl" "us_nv" "ca_nb" "us_nh" "us_nj" "us_nm" "us_ny" "nz" "ca_nl" "us_nc" "us_nd" "no" "ca_ns" "us_oh" "us_ok" "us_or" "pk" "pa" "us_pa" "pl" "ca_pe" "pr" "ca_qc" "us_ri" "ro" "rw" "re" "bl" "mf" "pm" "sg" "sk" "si" "za" "us_sc" "us_sd" "es" "se" "ch" "tj" "tz" "us_tn" "us_tx" "th" "to" "tn" "ug" "ua" "gb" "us_ut" "vu" "us_vt" "vn" "us_va" "us_wa" "us_wv" "us_wi" "us_wy"

Required with company_number

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "organisation"
id
integer
name
string <= 255
company_number
null or string <= 255
jurisdiction
null or string
Enum: "ae_az" "us_al" "us_ak" "al" "us_az" "us_ar" "aw" "au" "bs" "bh" "bd" "bb" "by" "be" "bz" "bm" "bo" "br" "bg" "us_ca" "kh" "ca" "us_co" "us_ct" "hr" "cw" "cy" "us_de" "dk" "us_dc" "do" "ae_du" "fi" "us_fl" "fr" "gf" "us_ga" "de" "gi" "gr" "gl" "gp" "gg" "us_hi" "hk" "is" "us_id" "in" "us_in" "us_ia" "ir" "ie" "im" "il" "jm" "jp" "je" "us_ks" "us_ky" "lv" "li" "us_la" "lu" "us_me" "my" "mt" "mq" "us_md" "us_ma" "mu" "yt" "mx" "us_mi" "us_mn" "us_ms" "us_mo" "md" "us_mt" "me" "mm" "us_ne" "nl" "us_nv" "ca_nb" "us_nh" "us_nj" "us_nm" "us_ny" "nz" "ca_nl" "us_nc" "us_nd" "no" "ca_ns" "us_oh" "us_ok" "us_or" "pk" "pa" "us_pa" "pl" "ca_pe" "pr" "ca_qc" "us_ri" "ro" "rw" "re" "bl" "mf" "pm" "sg" "sk" "si" "za" "us_sc" "us_sd" "es" "se" "ch" "tj" "tz" "us_tn" "us_tx" "th" "to" "tn" "ug" "ua" "gb" "us_ut" "vu" "us_vt" "vn" "us_va" "us_wa" "us_wv" "us_wi" "us_wy"

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
path Parameters
id
required
integer
Request Body schema: application/json
name
required
string <= 255
company_number
null or string <= 255
jurisdiction
null or string
Enum: "ae_az" "us_al" "us_ak" "al" "us_az" "us_ar" "aw" "au" "bs" "bh" "bd" "bb" "by" "be" "bz" "bm" "bo" "br" "bg" "us_ca" "kh" "ca" "us_co" "us_ct" "hr" "cw" "cy" "us_de" "dk" "us_dc" "do" "ae_du" "fi" "us_fl" "fr" "gf" "us_ga" "de" "gi" "gr" "gl" "gp" "gg" "us_hi" "hk" "is" "us_id" "in" "us_in" "us_ia" "ir" "ie" "im" "il" "jm" "jp" "je" "us_ks" "us_ky" "lv" "li" "us_la" "lu" "us_me" "my" "mt" "mq" "us_md" "us_ma" "mu" "yt" "mx" "us_mi" "us_mn" "us_ms" "us_mo" "md" "us_mt" "me" "mm" "us_ne" "nl" "us_nv" "ca_nb" "us_nh" "us_nj" "us_nm" "us_ny" "nz" "ca_nl" "us_nc" "us_nd" "no" "ca_ns" "us_oh" "us_ok" "us_or" "pk" "pa" "us_pa" "pl" "ca_pe" "pr" "ca_qc" "us_ri" "ro" "rw" "re" "bl" "mf" "pm" "sg" "sk" "si" "za" "us_sc" "us_sd" "es" "se" "ch" "tj" "tz" "us_tn" "us_tx" "th" "to" "tn" "ug" "ua" "gb" "us_ut" "vu" "us_vt" "vn" "us_va" "us_wa" "us_wv" "us_wi" "us_wy"

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "organisation"
id
integer
name
string <= 255
company_number
null or string <= 255
jurisdiction
null or string
Enum: "ae_az" "us_al" "us_ak" "al" "us_az" "us_ar" "aw" "au" "bs" "bh" "bd" "bb" "by" "be" "bz" "bm" "bo" "br" "bg" "us_ca" "kh" "ca" "us_co" "us_ct" "hr" "cw" "cy" "us_de" "dk" "us_dc" "do" "ae_du" "fi" "us_fl" "fr" "gf" "us_ga" "de" "gi" "gr" "gl" "gp" "gg" "us_hi" "hk" "is" "us_id" "in" "us_in" "us_ia" "ir" "ie" "im" "il" "jm" "jp" "je" "us_ks" "us_ky" "lv" "li" "us_la" "lu" "us_me" "my" "mt" "mq" "us_md" "us_ma" "mu" "yt" "mx" "us_mi" "us_mn" "us_ms" "us_mo" "md" "us_mt" "me" "mm" "us_ne" "nl" "us_nv" "ca_nb" "us_nh" "us_nj" "us_nm" "us_ny" "nz" "ca_nl" "us_nc" "us_nd" "no" "ca_ns" "us_oh" "us_ok" "us_or" "pk" "pa" "us_pa" "pl" "ca_pe" "pr" "ca_qc" "us_ri" "ro" "rw" "re" "bl" "mf" "pm" "sg" "sk" "si" "za" "us_sc" "us_sd" "es" "se" "ch" "tj" "tz" "us_tn" "us_tx" "th" "to" "tn" "ug" "ua" "gb" "us_ut" "vu" "us_vt" "vn" "us_va" "us_wa" "us_wv" "us_wi" "us_wy"
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>

application/json

}

https://amiqusid.test/api/documents

query Parameters

integer >= 1
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
enabled
boolean
expand
Array of strings
Items Value: "attachment"

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "paginated_list"
Array of objects (Document)
total
integer >= 0
count
integer >= 0
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
current_page
integer >= 1
total_pages
integer >= 1
null or Pagination links (object)

Content type
application/json

        • "object": "attachment",

        • "original": "NDA-final.pdf",
        • "type": "application/pdf",
        • "size": 272534,
        • "av_status": "clean",

        • "updated_at": "2022-08-17T13:56:05Z"
        },
      • "created_at": "2022-08-17T13:56:05Z",
      • "updated_at": "2022-08-17T13:56:05Z"
      }
    ],

  • "count": 1,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,

  • "links": null
}

      • "presets": {
        • "steps": [
          • {
            • "object": "step",
            • "type": "check.photo_id",

              • "report_type": "standard",

Vel vel nihil autem alias dignissimos.\nQuia dolores et sequi est rem. Neque at debitis facere ullam ut eligendi distinctio cumque itaque. Eum dignissimos ea. Reiciendis corporis hic sunt cupiditate dolor est. Saepe et qui unde earum et eum est. Qui architecto maxime ab aut dolor voluptatum qui sed consequatur.",
        • "reminder": true
        },
      • "is_enabled": true,

      • "updated_at": "2022-08-13T14:12:53Z"
      },

Create a webhook

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/webhooks

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/webhooks

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/webhooks

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/webhooks

Create a webhook.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
Request Body schema: application/json
url
required
string
events
required
Array of strings (WebhookSubscribeEvents) non-empty unique
Items Enum: "*" "client.*" "form.*" "record.*" "client.archived" "client.created" "client.deleted" "client.organisations" "client.record" "client.status" "client.unarchived" "client.updated" "form.attached" "form.deleted" "form.modified" "form.sent" "form.submitted" "form.updated" "record.bounced" "record.created" "record.finished" "record.reviewed" "record.unreviewed" "record.updated"

The event or events this webhook is subscribed to. Supports wildcards; * all events, client.* all client events, etc.
is_enabled
boolean
Default: true

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "webhook"
id
integer
uuid
string <uuid>
url
string
events
Array of strings (WebhookSubscribeEvents) non-empty unique
Items Enum: "*" "client.*" "form.*" "record.*" "client.archived" "client.created" "client.deleted" "client.organisations" "client.record" "client.status" "client.unarchived" "client.updated" "form.attached" "form.deleted" "form.modified" "form.sent" "form.submitted" "form.updated" "record.bounced" "record.created" "record.finished" "record.reviewed" "record.unreviewed" "record.updated"

The event or events this webhook is subscribed to. Supports wildcards; * all events, client.* all client events, etc.
is_enabled
boolean
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "url": "https://example.org/incoming/webhooks/amiqus",
  • "events": [
    • "client.*",
    • "record.*"
    ]
}

}

id

integer >= 1

integer [ 1 .. 100 ]

object

integer [ 1 .. 100 ]

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json

Example of a successful delivery for a ping event.

{
  • "object": "paginated_list",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "object": "webhook_delivery",
      • "id": 4532,
      • "uuid": "095be615-a8ad-4c33-8e9c-c7612fbf6c9f",
      • "event": "ping",
      • "attempts": 1,
      • "request": {
        • "url": "https://example.org/incoming/webhooks/amiqus",
        • "method": "POST",
        • "headers": {
          • "Content-Length": "1234",
          • "Host": "example.org",
          • "User-Agent": "Amiqus AmiqusID/8927532",
          • "Content-Type": "application/json",
          • "X-AQID-Signature": "I4BqQLTTfg1i24UFa9o9wS+qf+lo9BVeuBlO6tS5Y20=",
          • "X-AQID-Delivery-Id": "d7583a16-ad9e-4ec8-a53f-ffc67fd2445c"
          },
        • "body": {
          • "uuid": "095be615-a8ad-4c33-8e9c-c7612fbf6c9f",
          • "event": "ping",
          • "sent_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "data": [
            • "ping"
            ]
          }
        },
      • "response": {
        • "status_code": "204",
        • "headers": {
          • "Cache-Control": "no-cache, private",
          • "Date": "Mon, 22 Aug 2022 16:20:33 GMT"
          },
        • "body": { }
        },
      • "last_sent_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 1,
  • "count": 1,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "current_page": 1,
  • "total_pages": 1,
  • "links": null
}

Create a form

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/forms

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/forms

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/forms

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/forms

Create a form.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
Request Body schema: application/json
name
required
string <= 255 characters
description
null or string
instructions
null or string
required
Array of Section (object) or Heading (object) or Paragraph (object) or Short Answer (object) or Long Answer (object) or Single Choice (object) (BuilderFields) >= 2 items

The first field must always be a Section. Any Fields not present in a Section are omitted.
is_enabled
boolean
Default: true

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "form_template"
id
integer
reference
string <uuid>
name
string <= 255 characters
description
null or string
instructions
null or string
Array of Section (object) or Heading (object) or Paragraph (object) or Short Answer (object) or Long Answer (object) or Single Choice (object) (BuilderFields) >= 2 items

The first field must always be a Section. Any Fields not present in a Section are omitted.
version
integer
is_enabled
boolean
created_at
string <date-time>
updated_at
string <date-time>
archived_at
null or string <date-time>

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example

A simple form with two required fields inside a section.

{
  • "name": "New starter form",
  • "fields": [
    • {
      • "id": "1",
      • "type": "section",
      • "label": "",
      • "fields": [
        • "2"
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "id": "2",
      • "type": "section",
      • "label": "Onboarding",
      • "fields": [
        • "3",
        • "4"
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "id": "3",
      • "type": "text",
      • "label": "Job title",
      • "validation": [
        • "required"
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "id": "4",
      • "type": "radio",
      • "label": {
        • "value": "Contract type",
        • "options": [
          • "Full-time",
          • "Part-time"
          ]
        },
      • "validation": [
        • "required"
        ]
      }
    ]
}

required

non-empty

string <= 255 characters

null or string
instructions
null or string
Array of Section (object) or Heading (object) or Paragraph (object) or Short Answer (object) or Long Answer (object) or Single Choice (object) (BuilderFields) >= 2 items

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example

Update the "New starter form" adding a new multple choice answer.

{
  • "fields": [
    • {
      • "id": "1",
      • "type": "section",
      • "label": "",
      • "fields": [
        • "2"
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "id": "2",
      • "type": "section",
      • "label": "Onboarding",
      • "fields": [
        • "3",
        • "4"
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "id": "3",
      • "type": "text",
      • "label": "Job title",
      • "validation": [
        • "required"
        ]
      },
    • {
      • "id": "4",
      • "type": "radio",
      • "label": {
        • "value": "Contract type",
        • "options": [
          • "Full-time",
          • "Part-time",
          • "Contractor"
          ]
        },
      • "validation": [
        • "required"
        ]
      }
    ]
}

Create an SDK token

Local

https://amiqusid.test/api/v2/sdk_token

Production

https://id.amiqus.co/api/v2/sdk_token

Stage

https://stage.aqid.co/api/v2/sdk_token

Local v1

https://amiqusid.test/api/sdk_token

Create an SDK token.

Authorizations:
personal_tokenoauth
Request Body schema: application/json
record_id
required
integer

The SDK Token is scoped for this individual Record only.

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
object
string
Value: "sdk_token"
token
string

A JSON Web Token, valid for 60 minutes.

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "record_id": 44568
}

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "object": "sdk_token",
